disclaimer: Fever Watch is a risk indicator that blends breeding weather, search interest and lab positivity into one decomposable score per city and disease. It is not a diagnosis, a count of actual cases or mosquitoes, or medical advice. Forecast-only locations are capped and cannot show HIGH.

weather.attribution: Weather data by NASA POWER (MERRA-2 / GMAO), public domain
